phase_history.key_outcome: 4 bundled digest-UX tweaks (retry x7, top-N truncate, truncation alert, Option A per-item embeds); scope=tiny; 2 design-sensitive seam decisions flagged for architect
12 ACs (AC-V4-002-001..012 + 005b), 8 BRs, 1 INT across 4 capabilities; openspec validate PASS
4 ADRs (truncate step, renderer kw-param, in-adapter embed parse, retry default), 0 endpoints (CLI), 7 task groups + 2 checkpoints; openspec validate PASS

phase_history.note: 727 tests pass; coverage 90% on changed modules; _truncate_per_type added, renderer alert, Option-A per-item embeds, retry default 7; 5 deviations documented
GO — 0 bugs, 15/15 ACs verified, 727 tests pass, 90% coverage; byte-identical no-op confirmed, T1 preserved, mark_seen idempotency structural
Release v0.15.0 — 727 tests, 0 lint errors, 4 lint fixes, openspec archived; 4 capabilities shipped (retry x7, top-N cap, truncation alert, per-item embeds)

active_concerns: Truncation MUST run BEFORE summarize in a dedicated _truncate_per_type step; mark_seen still records full set (idempotency)
Embed per-item data comes from in-adapter Markdown re-parse (ADR-003) — parser coupled to renderer _build_item_line format; zero-parsed-items => plain-text fallback
render() gains additive kw params (dropped_counts, max_items_per_type) with None defaults — no-op must be byte-identical; dropped_counts keys on item.raw.repo
Update always-fails-429 summarizer test 3->7 (retry default change)
T1: reshaped embed POST must keep _post_one_embed status/type-only error (URL never leaked); fixed color dict, no hash()

terminology.max_items_per_type: [watchlist] positive-int cap (default 10) on items per (repo,item_type); truncates oldest, keeps newest by created_at desc, BEFORE summarize
terminology.truncation alert: renderer line '⚠️ +{count} items not shown (limit: {N})' per repo when items were dropped
terminology.Option A embed: one Discord embed per item (title/summary/type-color/footer) + one yellow header embed per repo; replaces v4-001 one-embed-per-repo
